results.rendered_html:
nibandhin (von nibandha) adj.
1〉 bindend, fesselnd: nibandhinī (nibandhanī 12,9953 . 12114 ) rajjureṣā yā grāme vasato ratiḥ  MBH. 12,6548 .
— 2〉 verbunden durch, mit, zusammenhängend mit: nirmāṃsairasthibhūyiṣṭhairgātraiḥ snāyunibandhibhiḥ (˚nibandhanaiḥ 11,120 )  MBH. 11,89 . (kaṇḍarāṇām) grīvāhṛdayanibandhinīnām  SUŚR. 1,338,8 . Inschr. in  Journ. of the Am. Or. S. 7,11, Śl. 44 .
— 3〉 bedingend, verursachend: sthiti˚  YOGAS. 1,35 .
